heading: Investments of stock required by treaties
label: 157 Investments of stock required by treaties
text: All investments of stock, that are or may be required by treaties with the Indians, shall be made under the direction of the President; and special accounts of the funds under such treaties shall be kept at the Treasury, and statements thereof be annually laid before Congress.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 2095 derived from , .act Jan. 9, 1837, ch. 1, § 35 Stat. 135
